summary: Iteration 3 multi-firm support tested end-to-end. Backend (8/8 pytest cases) and Frontend (Firm CRUD, switcher, per-firm trip filtering, All-Firms view with Firm column, invoice letterhead, expenses firm dropdown) all pass. Regression suite (payments ledger, commission auto-calc, trucks/drivers/parties CRUD) also green.

issues: At 1440-wide viewport the SheetContent (sm:max-w-md) can push the Save button beyond the visible area on some screens; scroll-into-view is needed. Not a functional bug but consider a max-width or sticky footer for the action buttons.
Legacy trips created before multi-firm show '—' in the Firm column since firm_id was not tagged. Consider a small back-fill script or hint in UI. Behavior is expected/backward compatible.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 601 lines and defines all models + endpoints in a single file. Consider splitting Firm/Truck/Driver/Party/Trip/Expense into modules as it grows.
Startup event 'seed_firms' uses deprecated FastAPI on_event; migrate to lifespan handlers.
Trips.jsx is ~520 lines and mixes list, form and Payment ledger dialog — should be split into <TripsList>, <TripForm>, <PaymentDialog> modules.
Legacy trips (no firm_id) are hidden from all firm-scoped queries — acceptable, but consider providing a UI hint or a one-time migration tool.
seed_data_creation: Startup auto-seeds firms DEEP LOGISTICS and SHEETAL TRANSPORT CO if firms collection is empty; verified. Tests create/clean up their own TEST_ prefixed data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-firm is fully wired: FirmProvider stores firm_id in localStorage (brokerdesk_firm_id). Backend endpoints /api/trips, /api/expenses, /api/stats/summary all accept optional ?firm_id=. Trip create form pre-fills active firm from switcher. Invoice fetches /api/firms and uses firm.name as letterhead. Leftover UI test trips (TESTUI_Mumbai, Mumbai→Pune) are present in DB from previous runs — not created by this iteration.
